hero.subtitle: Guest Guide
hero.tagline: As the Aegean Is... Simple. Natural. Vibrant.

info.title: Welcome to BAŞKA
info.subtitle: Your Aegean escape awaits
info.description: BAŞKA Resort Bodrum offers a coastal village atmosphere that authentically reflects the untouched beauty of the Aegean.
info.addressVal: Eski Çeşme Mah. Haremtan Sok. No:11, Bodrum, Muğla 48400, Türkiye
info.parkingVal: Free open parking, valet available, EV charging (paid)
info.locationVal: Bodrum Castle 1.5 km, City Center 1.2 km, Airport 35 km
info.petVal: Pets up to 12 kg in designated rooms — €45/day

wifi.title: Wi-Fi Connection
wifi.subtitle: Stay connected throughout your stay
wifi.coverageDesc: Free Wi-Fi available throughout the entire resort — rooms, lobby, pool, beach and all public areas.

rooms.title: Room Types & Features
rooms.subtitle: Refined comfort with breathtaking Bodrum views
rooms.description: All rooms feature balcony/terrace, capsule coffee machine, daily minibar, premium amenities, safe, Wi-Fi, LED TV, A/C, and daily housekeeping.
rooms.egeDesc: Main Building, Sea & Island View, 20–30 m²
rooms.egeFamilyDesc: Main Building, Sea & Island View, 36–42 m²
rooms.egeClubDesc: Club Area, Sea & Island View, 19–30 m²
rooms.egeClubFamilyDesc: Club Area, Sea & Island View, 30–45 m²
rooms.stoneHousesDesc: Club Area, Sea & Island View, 22–25 m²
rooms.askADesc: Club Area, Sea View, Romantic Concept, 30–35 m²
rooms.domeDesc: Club Area, Private Garden, Butler Service, 100 m² Terrace

dining.title: Dining
dining.subtitle: All-inclusive, the BAŞKA way
dining.mainDesc: Open buffet breakfast, lunch & dinner with fresh Aegean mezes, hot dishes, salads, fruits & desserts
dining.lezizDesc: Beachfront Aegean gourmet with breakfast and daytime specialties. 08:00–17:00
dining.daimaDesc: International cuisine available around the clock. 24 hours, complimentary BAI
dining.concept: Inspired by Türkiye's rich culinary heritage with zero-waste practices, local & healthy food concept, and region-focused supply chain.

alacarte.title: À La Carte Restaurants
alacarte.subtitle: Five distinct dining experiences
alacarte.fishDesc: Daily fresh fish & Aegean meze à la carte

bars.title: Bars & Cafes
bars.subtitle: From morning coffee to midnight treats

beach.title: Beach & Pool
beach.subtitle: Seafront location with private beach
beach.beachDesc: Private beach with pier and sunbathing decks. Towels, umbrellas and sun loungers provided free of charge.
beach.pavilionDesc: Private beachfront cabanas available by reservation (chargeable)
beach.poolDesc: Open 08:00–20:00. Heated during pre- and post-season

spa.title: Soul Spa & Fitness
spa.subtitle: Aegean-inspired wellness
spa.spaDesc: Refined and minimalist self-care programs inspired by Aegean spa culture. Open 09:00–19:00.

activities.title: Activities & Entertainment
activities.subtitle: A BAŞKA way of life in Bodrum
activities.sailingDesc: Non-motorized water sports, windsurfing & catamaran courses, yacht tours
activities.entertainmentDesc: Curated live music, stage shows, and calm daytime activities
activities.acousticDesc: Live acoustic music at à la carte venues on selected days

kids.title: Kids Club
kids.subtitle: Fun for ages 4–12
kids.miniClubDesc: Dedicated area for children ages 4–12. Open 10:00–18:00

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Free & paid services at your fingertips
services.free5: In-room tea, herbal teas, capsule coffee & local Bodrum treats

important.title: Important Information
important.subtitle: Please review before your stay
items: Check-in: 15:00 | Check-out: 12:00
Earliest resort entry: 10:00 | Latest departure: 15:00
A valid photo ID or passport is required at check-in (legal requirement)
Mini Club operates 10:00 – 18:00; children must be accompanied at entry and exit
Guests under 18 are not served alcoholic beverages
Alcohol service complies with local regulations
Smoking is permitted only in designated outdoor areas; smoking is prohibited inside rooms and indoor public spaces
Guests with food allergies or special dietary requirements please inform staff at service points
Mini bar is replenished daily between 08:00 – 16:00
In-room tea, herbal teas and capsule coffee are complimentary
Outdoor pool is open 08:00 – 20:00; no lifeguard on duty — swim at your own risk
Glass items are not permitted in the pool or beach area
Children must not be left unattended in pool, beach or any resort area
Pool is heated during pre- and post-season
Bed linen is changed daily; towels are changed on request as part of our sustainability commitment
Advance reservation is required for à la carte restaurants
Smart-casual dress code at à la carte venues; shorts, swimwear and wet clothing are not permitted in the main restaurant
BAI beverages (local & selected imported) are complimentary; premium & imported beverages are chargeable
Room service is available and subject to additional charge
Valuables must be stored in the in-room safe; the resort is not liable for items left unattended
A notarized consent letter is required for children travelling with guardians of a different surname
Pets up to 12 kg are welcome in designated rooms — €45/day
Pets are not permitted in restaurants, pool or beach areas
Drone usage on resort premises requires prior approval — please contact reception
Visitors are accepted 09:00 – 18:00 and must register at reception; overnight visitors are not permitted
Unauthorized persons are not allowed in guest rooms
Beach shuttle service operates from the secondary road
In case of emergency, dial 0 from your room phone to reach reception
The fire evacuation plan is posted on the back of each room door
For lost & found enquiries please contact reception
important.sustainabilityDesc: Learn about our commitment to the environment, responsible tourism and Aegean culture.

footer.address: Eski Çeşme Mah. Haremtan Sok. No:11, Bodrum, Muğla 48400
